steps: Wash the neurons in PBS and incubate with Membrite prestain solution, dilute 1:1000 in HBSS, for 00:05:00 at 37 °C .
Change the prestain solution to staining solution and incubate for another 00:05:00 at 37 °C .
Dissociate the cells with prewarmed papain with DNAse, Y-27632 and Emricasan for 00:10:00 at 37 °C .
Quench the reaction in DMEM/Glutamax with 10% fetal bovine serum and collect by centrifugation at 400 x g, °C, 5 minutes .
Resuspend the pellet in 4% paraformaldehyde and incubate for 00:10:00 at Room temperature on a rolling wheel.

Resuspend the cells in DMEM with 10% FBS and spin at 500 x g, °C, 5 minutes after which the cells were incubated in permeabilization buffer (1% BSA, 0.1% saponin in PBS, 10% normal donkey serum for 00:30:00 at Room temperature and thereafter label with tyrosine hydroxylase antibody or isotype controls (1:400, Cat.# P40101-150, Pel-Freeze and Cat.# AB-105-C R&D respectively) Overnight at 4 °C .
Wash the cells twice with 2% BSA and 1.5 millimolar (mM) EDTA in PBS and then incubate with diluted Alexa647-conjugated secondary antibody, for 01:00:00 at Room temperature .
Wash the cells as described above with NucBlue Fixed Cell ReadyProbes Reagent in the second wash and resuspend in wash buffer for flow cytometry analysis.
Initial gate: Include Membrite+ cells Second gate: Include single cell DAPI (exclude duplicates). Third gate: Alexa647+
creator: Ellen Hertz
